title: taraxacum celsum
intro: Taraxacum celsum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum celsum include its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce water retention and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Taraxacum celsum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide a more comprehensive treatment for various health conditions.
